/** * @fileoverview Assertion utilities equivalent to the Node.js node:asserts module. * @author Josh Goldberg */ "use strict"; /** * Throws an error if the input is not truthy. * @param {unknown} value The input that is checked for being truthy. * @param {string} message Message to throw if the input is not truthy. * @returns {void} * @throws {Error} When the condition is not truthy. */ function ok(value, message = "Assertion failed.") { if (!value) { throw new Error(message); } } module.exports = ok;
